description:
## Background

The four Issue List WebDriver specs each redeclare the same typed-RPC
interfaces, the same `executeAsync` lambdas, and the same DOM
assertion helpers. This is a **Duplicated Code** smell (Fowler,
*Refactoring*). The copies have already drifted — the
`arguments_: object` typed signature is present in
`issue-list.empty.spec.ts` and `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` but
absent from `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`.

Per-file redeclarations:

- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts:40-180` —
  `WorkspaceSwitchResponse`, `WorkspaceStateResponse`,
  `invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch`, `invokeWorkspaceState`,
  `issueRowSelector`, `expectIssueVisible`,
  `expectSidebarWorkspacePath`.
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.success.spec.ts:32-160` — the same
  five symbols (plus an extra top-level `state` wrapper).
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.empty.spec.ts` and
  `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` — the same
  surfaces again, with subtle signature drift on the typed-transport
  `executeAsync` lambda.

## What to build

One helper module under `e2e/issue-list/helpers/` that owns the
canonical implementations of the typed-RPC interfaces, the
`executeAsync` lambdas, and the DOM helpers. The four specs import
these helpers; nothing in `e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts` redeclares any
of the above types or functions.

## Technical Approach

This is a **wide refactor** — its blast radius fans across the four
spec files. Sequence as expand–contract per the project template:

1. **Expand** (`bsm-kia.13.1`) — create
   `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts` exporting
   `WorkspaceSwitchResponse`, `WorkspaceStateResponse`,
   `invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch`, `invokeWorkspaceState`,
   `issueRowSelector`, and `expectIssueVisible`. No spec imports
   yet.
2. **Migrate** — replace the per-file copies one spec at a time:
   - `bsm-kia.13.2` — `issue-list.success.spec.ts` (blocked by .1)
   - `bsm-kia.13.3` — `issue-list.empty.spec.ts` (blocked by .1)
   - `bsm-kia.13.4` — `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` (blocked by
     .1)
   - `bsm-kia.13.5` — `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts` (blocked
     by .1)
3. **Contract** (`bsm-kia.13.6`) — delete the local copies in each
   spec; verify the symbols appear only in `helpers/rpc.ts` (blocked
   by .2, .3, .4, .5).

## Considerations

- Coordinate with `bsm-kia.14` (Shotgun Surgery). The sidebar
  helpers (`expectSidebarWorkspacePath`,
  `expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent`) belong in `helpers/sidebar.ts`
  and can land alongside `helpers/rpc.ts` in the same expand step.
  An agent may choose to land both epics in one PR by doing both
  expands first, then doing each spec's migration under both epic
  IDs in the same commit.
- Keep one canonical `arguments_: object` typed signature across
  all callers — no per-spec drift.
- The helper signatures must match the generated TauRPC binding
  types in `src/rpc/bindings.ts`.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts` exports the canonical types
      and helpers.
- [ ] Each spec imports from the helper; no spec redeclares the
      affected interfaces or functions.
- [ ] `rg "interface WorkspaceSwitchResponse|interface WorkspaceStateResponse|invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch|invokeWorkspaceState|issueRowSelector|expectIssueVisible" e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts`
      returns zero hits.
- [ ] All four specs continue to assert everything they assert today
      (verified by `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
      `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` passing without per-spec
      edits).
- [ ] No spec-local type drift between `arguments_: object` and
      `Record<string, unknown>`.

## Test Plan

- Vitest unit tests for any pure helpers extracted into the module
  (e.g., `issueRowSelector` formatting if it has no WebdriverIO
  dependency).
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
  `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` after every migrate batch to
  prove no behavioral regression.

## Sub-issues

- `bsm-kia.13.1` — Expand: create `helpers/rpc.ts`
- `bsm-kia.13.2` — Migrate `issue-list.success.spec.ts`
- `bsm-kia.13.3` — Migrate `issue-list.empty.spec.ts`
- `bsm-kia.13.4` — Migrate `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
- `bsm-kia.13.5` — Migrate `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`
- `bsm-kia.13.6` — Contract: delete local copies, verify `rg`
title: Collapse duplicate Workspace RPC and sidebar helpers across the four e2e specs
